title: Какой Perfect — по точке отсчёта
description: Распредели предложения по четырём корзинам. Все Continuous-варианты (Present / Past / Future Perfect Continuous) — в одной корзине.

items.text: I have just finished the report.
items.explain: just + результат к настоящему → Present Perfect.

items.text: By 8 PM I had finished the report.
items.explain: by + момент прошлого → Past Perfect (had + V3).

items.text: By next Friday I will have finished the report.
items.explain: by + момент будущего → Future Perfect (will have + V3).

items.text: I have been studying English for five years.
items.explain: for + длительность процесса до сейчас → Present Perfect Continuous.

items.text: Have you ever been to Japan?
When I arrived, she had already left.
items.explain: Уход случился ДО прихода (already в прошлом контексте) → Past Perfect.

items.text: She had been working at the company for five years before she got promoted.
items.explain: Длительность до момента прошлого → Past Perfect Continuous.

items.text: By 2030 I will have been working here for ten years.
items.explain: by + будущее + for + длительность → Future Perfect Continuous.
since + точка, период не закончился, state-near глагол → Present Perfect (Continuous тоже допустим, но базовая форма — обычный Perfect).

items.text: The train had left before we got to the station.
items.explain: Поезд ушёл раньше нашего прихода — раннее в Past Perfect, позднее в Past Simple.

items.text: By the time you arrive, I will have cleaned the flat.
items.explain: by the time + Present Simple → главная часть Future Perfect (will have + V3).

items.text: You look tired — have you been running?
items.explain: Видимые следы недавнего процесса → Present Perfect Continuous.
never + общий опыт жизни → Present Perfect.

items.text: In two months we will have moved to the new office.
items.explain: in + период (от сейчас) и завершённость к моменту → Future Perfect.
